description_long: This airplane features a highly angular, futuristic design with sharply pointed nose and tail sections, and multiple swept, jagged wing surfaces extending from the fuselage. The body is predominantly dark and metallic, with a glossy, reflective finish that accentuates its aggressive, stealth-like appearance. The wings are sharply swept back and appear to be integrated into the main fuselage, with additional fin-like structures protruding from both the top and bottom. There are no visible windows, cockpit canopy, or traditional engine nacelles, giving it a stylized, almost abstract look. The tail section is split into two prominent, upward-angled fins, further enhancing its dynamic silhouette. The overall form suggests a high-speed, possibly unmanned or conceptual aircraft, with a focus on aerodynamic efficiency and visual impact.
description: A sleek, angular, dark metallic airplane with sharply swept wings, jagged fins, and a glossy, reflective surface, resembling a futuristic or conceptual stealth aircraft.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, symmetrical jagged wings, and prominent upward-angled fins, emphasizing the aggressive, stealthy profile.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated, streamlined fuselage, sharply swept wings, and the split tail fins extending upward and downward.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the twin upward-angled tail fins and the wide, angular wing structure, with no visible engine or exhaust details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the same elongated body, swept wings, and distinctive tail fin configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with sharply swept, jagged wings and additional fin-like extensions; no visible winglets; pronounced anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: No visible engines or nacelles present.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers with a V-tail configuration, sharply angled upward from the rear fuselage.
attribute_cockpit_placement: No visible cockpit or canopy; appears to lack a traditional crew compartment.
